## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] perf
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Testing

- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Ran `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Ran lint/type checks locally

## Checklist

- [ ] One feature/fix per PR
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] Updated README.md if behavior changed
- [ ] No sensitive data committed
